*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Surgical to Abdominal wall / Measures 4.1 cm x 2.7 cm / Stage: N/A
Drainage present - serosanguineous, heavy. No odor noted. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Abdominal wall wound site, rates 7/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Surgical surgical Abdominal wall measures 4.1 cm x 2.7 cm x 1.4 cm.
  Wound bed: 33% slough, 67% granulation tissue. Periwound: macerated.
  Drainage: heavy. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Surgical surgical Abdominal wall — not improving.
Plan: Alginate dressing applied. Offloading boot applied.
